about_description: At Jennymiaw Cat Cafe, you can relax and play with over 30 adorable cats in a cozy, welcoming space.
about_ticket_desc: With a single entry ticket, enjoy unlimited playtime with cats plus unlimited drinks and snacks.
about_cats_desc: From cute Munchkins to elegant Ragdolls — each cat has their own personality and story.
about_cozy_desc: Cute, comfortable design — the perfect place to unwind after a busy day.
gallery_subtitle: Every cat has their own personality and story — come meet them!
cafe_photos_subtitle: A cozy little corner in the heart of Hanoi — relax and unwind with our adorable cats.
contact_subtitle: Follow us for the latest cat photos and updates!
